item.title: 1964 Pontiac GTO Gasser Legend
item.description: A closer look at a legendary 1964 Pontiac GTO built in the iconic gasser style. The video highlights its unique appearance, performance heritage, and place in drag racing history. What do you like most about classic gasser builds?

media:content.media:title: 1964 Pontiac GTO Gasser Legend
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a legendary 1964 Pontiac GTO built in the iconic gasser style. The video highlights its unique appearance, performance heritage, and place in drag racing history. What do you like most about classic gasser builds?

item.title: 9-Year Build: 1953 Studebaker Commander
item.description: A look at a 1953 Studebaker Commander that took nine years to build. The video highlights the car’s history, restoration effort, and standout details. What makes this long build so memorable?

item.title: The Story of the 1961 Imperial Convertible
item.description: Discover the history of the 1961 Imperial Convertible, an elegant American luxury classic celebrated for its distinctive styling, craftsmanship, and place in automotive history
